title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 22 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 22 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 22 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/08/2025
Today, the most-traded iron ore futures contract I2601 was in the doldrums, closing at 770, down 0.71% from yesterday. Traders' quotationenthusiasm was moderate; steel mills were cautious and observing, with purchase willingness being average as the weekend approached. The market transaction atmosphere was sluggish.
